debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

proof:
by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hg
  apply h₁
  intro x
  have hgy_pos : 0 < |g y| := by linarith
  have key : ∀ z, |f z| * |g y| ≤ 1 := fun z => by
    have eq := h₀ z y
    have hb : |f (z + y) + f (z - y)| ≤ 2 := (abs_add _ _).trans (by linarith [h₂ (z+y), h₂ (z-y)])
    have h1 : 2 * |f z * g y| ≤ 2 := by
      have : |2 * f z * g y| = 2 * |f z * g y| := by
        rw [show (2:ℝ) * f z * g y = 2 * (f z * g y) by ring, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2)]
      linarith [this ▸ (eq ▸ hb : |2 * f z * g y| ≤ 2)]
    rw [← abs_mul]; linarith
  set r := |g y|⁻¹ with hr_def
  have hr_pos : 0 < r := inv_pos.mpr hgy_pos
  have hr_mul : r * |g y| = 1 := inv_mul_cancel₀ (ne_of_gt hgy_pos)
  have hr_lt1 : r < 1 := by nlinarith
  have iter : ∀ n : ℕ, ∀ z, |f z| ≤ r ^ n := fun n => by
    induction n with
    | zero => intro z; simp only [pow_zero]; exact h₂ z
    | succ n ih =>
      intro z
      have eq := h₀ z y
      have hb : |f (z + y) + f (z - y)| ≤ 2 * r ^ n := (abs_add _ _).trans (by linarith [ih (z+y), ih (z-y)])
      have h1 : 2 * |f z * g y| ≤ 2 * r ^ n := by
        have : |2 * f z * g y| = 2 * |f z * g y| := by
          rw [show (2:ℝ) * f z * g y = 2 * (f z * g y) by ring, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2)]
        linarith [this ▸ (eq ▸ hb : |2 * f z * g y| ≤ 2 * r ^ n)]
      have h2 : |f z| * |g y| ≤ r ^ n := by rw [← abs_mul]; linarith
      have h3 : |f z| ≤ r ^ n * r := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg (f z), pow_pos hr_pos n]
      calc |f z| ≤ r ^ n * r := h3
        _ = r ^ (n + 1) := by ring
  have tendsto_zero : Filter.Tendsto (fun n => r ^ n) Filter.atTop (nhds 0) :=
    tendsto_pow_atTop_nhds_zero_of_lt_one hr_pos.le hr_lt1
  by_contra hfx
  have hfx_pos : 0 < |f x| := abs_pos.mpr hfx
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := Metric.tendsto_atTop.mp tendsto_zero (|f x|) hfx_pos
  specialize hN N le_rfl
  simp only [Real.dist_eq, sub_zero, abs_of_pos (pow_pos hr_pos _)] at hN
  linarith [iter N x]
successful_attempts:
by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hg
  apply h₁

  have hfx_pos : 0 < |f x| := abs_pos.mpr hfx
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := Metric.tendsto_atTop.mp tendsto_zero (|f x|) hfx_pos
